de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class ProgramSV

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractOperator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSV
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramSV
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Declaration, MemberDeclaration, Expression, ExpressionStatement, ExpressionContainer, Label, LoopInitializer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, IExecutionContext, MemberReference, MethodName, NameReference, PackageReferenceContainer, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReference, TypeReferenceContainer, TypeReferenceInfix, SourceElement, Statement, Branch, IForUpdates, IGuard, ILoopInit, StatementContainer, TerminalProgramElement, Named, IObserverFunction, IProgramMethod, IProgramVariable, Operator, ParsableVariable, SchemaVariable, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, UpdateableOperator, ProgramConstruct, Sorted

    public final class ProgramSV
extends AbstractSV
implements ProgramConstruct, UpdateableOperator
    Objects of this class are schema variables matching program constructs within modal operators. The particular construct being matched is determined by the ProgramSVSort of the schema variable.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private static ProgramList EMPTY_LIST_INSTANTIATION 
      private boolean isListSV 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ProgramSV(Name name, ProgramSVSort s, boolean isListSV)
      creates a new SchemaVariable used as a placeholder for program constructs

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      private MatchConditions addProgramInstantiation(ProgramElement pe, MatchConditions matchCond, Services services)
      adds a found mapping from schema variable var to program element pe and returns the updated match conditions or null if mapping is not possible because of violating some variable condition
      private MatchConditions addProgramInstantiation(ProgramList list, MatchConditions matchCond, Services services)
      adds a found mapping from schema variable var to the list of program elements list and returns the updated match conditions or null if mapping is not possible because of violating some variable condition
      private boolean check(ProgramElement match, ExecutionContext ec, Services services)
      returns true, if the given SchemaVariable can stand for the ProgramElement
      boolean equalsModRenaming(SourceElement se, NameAbstractionTable nat)
      this method tests on object identity

      ProgramElement getChildAt(int index)
      Returns the child at the specified index in this node's "virtual" child array.
      int getChildCount()
      Returns the number of children of this node.

      Get comments.
      KeYJavaType getContainerType()
      Returns the container type of this symbol; for non-static observer symbols, this corresponds to the sort of its second argument.

      Position getEndPosition()
      Returns the end position of the primary token of this element.

      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source.

      complete position information

      returns the runtime instance object
      Position getStartPosition()
      Returns the start position of the primary token of this element.
      int getStateCount()
      Check the state count of the declaration (no_state = 0, two_state = 2, 1 otherwise).

      • ProgramSV

        ProgramSV(Name name,
         ProgramSVSort s,
         boolean isListSV)
        creates a new SchemaVariable used as a placeholder for program constructs
        Parameters:
        name - the Name of the SchemaVariable allowed to match a list of program constructs

      • getStartPosition

        public Position getStartPosition()
        Description copied from interface: SourceElement
        Returns the start position of the primary token of this element. To get the start position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getFirstElement().

        getStartPosition in interface Label
        Specified by:
        getStartPosition in interface SourceElement
        Returns:
        the start position of the primary token.

      • addProgramInstantiation

        private MatchConditions addProgramInstantiation(ProgramElement pe,
                                      MatchConditions matchCond,
                                      Services services)
        adds a found mapping from schema variable var to program element pe and returns the updated match conditions or null if mapping is not possible because of violating some variable condition
        Parameters:
        pe - the ProgramElement var is mapped to
        matchCond - the MatchConditions to be updated
        services - the Services provide access to the Java model
        Returns:
        the updated match conditions including mapping var to pe or null if some variable condition would be hurt by the mapping

      • addProgramInstantiation

        private MatchConditions addProgramInstantiation(ProgramList list,
                                      MatchConditions matchCond,
                                      Services services)
        adds a found mapping from schema variable var to the list of program elements list and returns the updated match conditions or null if mapping is not possible because of violating some variable condition
        Parameters:
        list - the ProgramList var is mapped to
        matchCond - the MatchConditions to be updated
        services - the Services provide access to the Java model
        Returns:
        the updated match conditions including mapping var to list or null if some variable condition would be hurt by the mapping

      • matchListSV

        private MatchConditions matchListSV(SourceData source,
                          MatchConditions matchCond)

      • check

        private boolean check(ProgramElement match,
            ExecutionContext ec,
            Services services)
        returns true, if the given SchemaVariable can stand for the ProgramElement
        Parameters:
        match - the ProgramElement to be matched
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        true if the SchemaVariable can stand for the given element

      • match

        public MatchConditions match(SourceData source,
                    MatchConditions matchCond)
        Description copied from interface: ProgramElement
        matches the source "text" (@link SourceData#getSource()) against the pattern represented by this object. In case of a successful match the resulting MatchConditions with the found instantiations of the schemavariables. If the match failed, null is returned instead.
        Specified by:
        match in interface ProgramElement
        Parameters:
        source - the SourceData with the program element to match
        matchCond - the MatchConditions found up to this point
        Returns:
        the resulting match conditions or null if the match failed

      • getParamTypes

        public ImmutableArray<KeYJavaType> getParamTypes()
        Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
        Returns the parameter types of this observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object.
        Specified by:
        getParamTypes in interface IObserverFunction
        Specified by:
        getParamTypes in interface IProgramMethod

      • getContainerType

        public KeYJavaType getContainerType()
        Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
        Returns the container type of this symbol; for non-static observer symbols, this corresponds to the sort of its second argument.
        Specified by:
        getContainerType in interface IObserverFunction

      • getNumParams

        public int getNumParams()
        Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
        Gives the number of parameters of the observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object. Thus, for observer symbols representing model fields, this will always return 0.
        Specified by:
        getNumParams in interface IObserverFunction

      • getParamType

        public KeYJavaType getParamType(int i)
        Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
        Gives the type of the i-th parameter of this observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object.
        Specified by:
        getParamType in interface IObserverFunction
